summary: Solid production-ready code. Workflow correctly uses pinned actions, minimal permissions, set -euo pipefail, and proper exit code handling. TypeScript has explicit types, comprehensive input validation (dates, config shape, duplicates), clear error messages. Minor: JSON output step doesn't validate JSON structure (uses || true), though conscious design choice since markdown report gates the job. set +e/set -e pattern (lines 39-45) is valid but slightly unconventional. No dead code or duplication. All modules well-factored with good error handling.
